For faster service, use the Southwest app chat feature, 🌈+1»⇌888⇌422⇌4922 contact them via Twitter/X, or utilize the Help Center and flight inquiries. 🌈+1»⇌888⇌422⇌4922 Rapid Rewards support is available at 1-800-445-5764.  🚀📊1 (888) 422-4922 Southwest Airlines customer service can be reached at 1-800-I-FLY-SWA (🌈+1»⇌888⇌422⇌4922 || uk (44)(800)054-8541) for booking, flight status, and support. ✈️+1➻888➻[422]➻4922✈️ The airline provides 24/7 assistance through their Help Center for cancellations, rebooking, and rapid rewards, ✈️+1➻888➻[422]➻4922✈️ and offers specialized support for disabilities
